prompt: Upscale-casual restaurant interior at golden hour. Warm ambient lighting, exposed brick walls, candles on tables, soft bokeh in background. A few elegantly plated dishes on a dark wood table in the foreground. Moody, inviting, cinematic. No people. Shot from a low angle across the table. Editorial food photography, rich earthy tones.

Kitchen pass view — hands plating food, wisps of steam rising, shallow depth of field. Stainless steel pass, warm overhead lighting, fresh herbs scattered. Action and energy without chaos. No faces visible, just hands and food. Editorial food photography, warm moody tones.

Beautiful overhead flat-lay of a full dinner table spread. Multiple plated dishes, wine glasses, bread basket, linen napkins on dark wood table. Warm candlelight, rich shadows. Shot directly from above. Editorial food photography, rich earthy tones.

Restaurant storefront exterior at dusk. Warm light glowing from inside through large windows. Simple signage, sidewalk seating visible, string lights. Golden hour sky. Welcoming and atmospheric. Editorial photography, warm tones.

Restaurant interior — main dining room. Exposed brick wall, dark wood tables, candlelit, warm pendant lighting overhead. A couple visible in soft focus at a distant table. Cozy, intimate, slightly moody. Shot at eye level from across the room. Editorial photography, rich earthy tones.

Craft cocktail on a dark bar counter. Amber-colored drink in a coupe glass, garnished with an orange peel twist. Blurred bottles and warm bar lighting in background. Close-up, shallow depth of field. Rich, warm tones. Editorial food photography.

Long table set for a private dinner party. White candles down the center, wine glasses at each place setting, cloth napkins, fresh flower arrangements. Warm lighting, intimate atmosphere. No people, just the anticipation of a gathering. Editorial photography, warm tones.

A man and woman in their early 40s standing together in a restaurant kitchen. He wears chef whites, she wears a dark apron. Both smiling warmly, relaxed and confident. Shallow depth of field, warm kitchen lighting behind them. Authentic, not posed. Editorial portrait photography.

Close-up of hands holding a wooden crate of fresh vegetables — heirloom tomatoes, leafy greens, herbs. Outdoor morning light, slightly dewy. Rustic, natural, farm-to-table feeling. Shallow depth of field, warm earth tones. Editorial food photography.

Overhead plating shot. Deep red roasted beets, creamy white burrata center, scattered hazelnuts, drizzle of golden honey-thyme vinaigrette. Dark slate plate, dark wood surface. Moody, editorial food photography. Rich earthy tones, shallow depth of field.

Close-up side angle. Golden-seared halibut fillet on a bed of saffron-yellow risotto. Roasted fennel alongside, delicate lemon-caper beurre blanc pooling. White plate, natural light from one side. Editorial food photography, warm tones.

45-degree angle. Braised lamb shank on bone, rich dark red wine jus, creamy polenta bed, root vegetables. Rustic stoneware bowl, linen napkin beside it. Warm, hearty, comfort food styling. Editorial food photography, rich earthy tones.

Overhead shot. Wide ribbons of fresh pappardelle tossed in dark wild boar ragù, dusted with pecorino, fresh herbs on top. Deep ceramic bowl, fork twirling pasta at edge of frame. Rustic, generous. Editorial food photography, warm moody tones.

Close-up, slightly above. Warm chocolate cake cut open with molten center flowing out. Scoop of salted caramel gelato beside it, thin candied orange peel garnish. Dark plate, dark background. Dramatic, indulgent. Editorial food photography, rich tones.

Two different cocktails side by side on a dark bar surface. One amber old fashioned style, one lighter golden wine-based. Garnished with citrus and herbs. Warm backlighting, bokeh from bar bottles. Atmospheric, not sterile. Editorial food photography.

Full room shot of the main dining area. Dark wood tables and chairs, exposed brick, pendant lighting, candles on tables. A few diners in soft focus. Warm evening atmosphere, slightly wider angle to show the scope of the space. Editorial interior photography, warm tones.

View of the open kitchen from the dining room side. Chefs working at the pass, flames visible, stainless steel surfaces. Counter seating in foreground. Energy and movement, warm tones from the fire and overhead lights. Editorial interior photography.

The restaurant bar — dark wood counter, leather bar stools, bottles lined up on shelves behind. Warm pendant lighting, a couple of cocktails on the counter. Intimate, slightly moody. No people or people in soft blur. Editorial interior photography, warm tones.

Small outdoor patio dining area. String lights overhead, greenery potted plants climbing vines, wrought iron or wood furniture. Dusk lighting — warm glow from inside the restaurant mixing with evening blue sky. Charming, urban. Editorial photography.

Intimate private room. Long rectangular table set for 12-16 guests, candles, wine glasses, cloth napkins. Warm wall sconces, possibly a statement art piece on the wall. Elegant but not formal. Empty, ready for guests. Editorial interior photography, warm tones.

Small table for 4-6 seats positioned right next to the kitchen pass. Close view of the kitchen action, with the table elegantly set in contrast. Unique dining perspective — the best seat in the house. Warm, atmospheric. Editorial interior photography.

Man in his early 40s, Mediterranean features, short dark hair, slight stubble. Wearing chef whites. Confident, warm smile. Kitchen background in soft focus. Natural lighting, warm tones. Head and shoulders portrait, square crop. Editorial portrait photography.

Woman in her early 40s, warm complexion, shoulder-length dark hair. Wearing a dark blazer or elegant top. Welcoming, genuine smile. Restaurant dining room background in soft focus. Natural lighting. Head and shoulders portrait, square crop. Editorial portrait photography.

Woman in her early 30s, dark skin, natural hair pulled back. Wearing chef whites or a dark apron. Creative, focused expression with a slight smile. Pastry station or kitchen background in soft focus. Warm lighting. Head and shoulders portrait, square crop. Editorial portrait photography.
